message:
chore: archive orphaned Copilot workflows (#8771)

Remove two workflows that are no longer reachable after the Copilot
reviewer/agent path was replaced by Claude:

- copilot-comment-followup.yml: waited for Copilot review comments
  post-merge to open follow-up issues. Copilot no longer reviews.
- copilot-setup-steps.yml: workflow_dispatch-only VM prep for the
  Copilot coding agent. Never invoked; agent path is retired.

No monitored workflow references either file.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,88 +0,0 @@
-name: Copilot Comment Follow-up
-
-# Check for unaddressed Copilot review comments on recently merged PRs.
-# Runs 10 minutes after merge to give Copilot time to post its review.
-
-on:
-  push:
-    branches: [main]
-
-permissions:
-  contents: read
-  issues: write
-  pull-requests: read
-
-# Debounce: if multiple merges happen quickly, only the last one runs
-concurrency:
-  group: copilot-comment-followup
-  cancel-in-progress: true
-
-jobs:
-  check-copilot-comments:
-    name: Check Copilot comments
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 15
-    steps:
-      - name: Wait for Copilot review to arrive
-        run: |
-          # Copilot reviews arrive asynchronously — wait 10 minutes
-          echo "Waiting 10 minutes for Copilot review comments to arrive..."
-          sleep 600
-
-      - name: Check for unaddressed comments
-        uses: actions/github-script@v8
-        with:
-          github-token: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
-          script: |
-            // Find the PR that was just merged (from the push event)
-            const { data: prs } = await github.rest.pulls.list({
-              owner: context.repo.owner,
-              repo: context.repo.repo,
-              state: 'closed',
-              sort: 'updated',
-              direction: 'desc',
-              per_page: 5,
-            })
-
-            const mergedPR = prs.find(pr => pr.merged_at && pr.merge_commit_sha === context.sha)
-            if (!mergedPR) {
-              core.info('No merged PR found for this push — skipping')
-              return
-            }
-
-            core.info(`Checking PR #${mergedPR.number}: ${mergedPR.title}`)
-
-            // Get review comments
-            const { data: comments } = await github.rest.pulls.listReviewComments({
-              owner: context.repo.owner,
-              repo: context.repo.repo,
-              pull_number: mergedPR.number,
-              per_page: 100,
-            })
-
-            const copilotComments = comments.filter(c =>
-              /copilot/i.test(c.user?.login || '')
-            )
-
-            if (copilotComments.length === 0) {
-              core.info('No Copilot comments found — all clear')
-              return
-            }
-
-            core.info(`Found ${copilotComments.length} Copilot comment(s)`)
-
-            // Format comments into an issue body
-            const commentList = copilotComments.map(c =>
-              `- **${c.path}:${c.line || c.original_line}**: ${c.body.substring(0, 200)}${c.body.length > 200 ? '...' : ''}`
-            ).join('\n')
-
-            // Create a follow-up issue
-            const { data: issue } = await github.rest.issues.create({
-              owner: context.repo.owner,
-              repo: context.repo.repo,
-              title: `[Copilot Review] ${copilotComments.length} comment(s) on merged PR #${mergedPR.number}`,
-              body: `## Copilot Review Comments\n\nPR #${mergedPR.number} (**${mergedPR.title}**) was merged with ${copilotComments.length} Copilot review comment(s) that should be addressed in a follow-up:\n\n${commentList}\n\n**PR:** ${mergedPR.html_url}\n\n---\n*Auto-generated by copilot-comment-followup workflow*`,
-              labels: ['kind/enhancement', 'ai-generated', 'triage/accepted'],
-            })
-
-            core.info(`Created follow-up issue #${issue.number}`)

@@ -1,56 +0,0 @@
-name: Copilot Setup Steps
-# Pre-configures the Copilot coding agent's Ubuntu VM with build tools.
-# This is the Copilot coding agent equivalent of gh-aw's "sandbox: agent: false".
-# The agent can then run: npm run build, npm run lint, go build, npx playwright test, etc.
-
-on: workflow_dispatch
-
-# Least-privilege: read-only by default; jobs declare write scopes individually
-permissions: read-all
-
-jobs:
-  copilot-setup-steps:
-    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
-    timeout-minutes: 30
-
-    steps:
-      - name: Checkout repository
-        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683 # v4.2.2
-
-      # --- Node.js / Frontend ---
-      - name: Setup Node.js 22
-        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
-        with:
-          node-version: "22"
-          cache: "npm"
-          cache-dependency-path: web/package-lock.json
-
-      - name: Install frontend dependencies
-        working-directory: web
-        run: npm ci
-
-      - name: Build frontend
-        working-directory: web
-        run: npm run build
-
-      - name: Install Playwright browsers
-        working-directory: web
-        run: npx playwright install --with-deps chromium
-
-      # --- Go / Backend ---
-      - name: Setup Go 1.25
-        uses: actions/setup-go@v5
-        with:
-          go-version: "1.25"
-          cache-dependency-path: go.sum
-
-      - name: Install C build tools (CGO for sqlite3)
-        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y gcc musl-tools
-
-      - name: Download Go modules
-        run: go mod download
-
-      - name: Build Go backend
-        env:
-          CGO_ENABLED: "1"
-        run: go build -o console ./cmd/console
